message:
chore(lockfile): refresh Cargo.lock for fnx-convert serde_json dep

The fnx-convert three-pass audit (f838e68f) added serde_json to
fnx-convert's [dependencies] (and surfaced it in fnx-convert's
proptest/regression tests) but the workspace lockfile still
recorded the old dependency closure. Re-resolve the lockfile so
fnx-convert's package entry now lists serde_json alongside its
existing fnx-classes / fnx-dispatch / fnx-runtime / proptest /
serde deps.

This is a pure lockfile sync — no Cargo.toml or source changes —
and no version bumps occur for any other crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
